THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM ON JUNE 11, 2012 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RUSSELL MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD FRAUD WITH MORE SPECIFICITY, INCLUDING FACTS REGARDING HOW THE MISREPRESENTATION WAS MADE AND WHERE IT WAS MADE. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO ALLEGE FACTS TO SHOW THAT MURPHY SHOULD BE PERSONALLY LIABLE FOR SUCH REPRESENTATIONS. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT RUSSELL MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES MISREPRESENTATIONS OF FACT. FOR EXAMPLE, PARAGRAPHS 42-44 OF THE AMENDED COMPLAINT ALLEGE THAT DEFENDANT FALSELY REPRESENTED THAT THE WORK WAS COMPLIANT WITH THE BUILDING CODE. AN INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR HIS OWN WRONGFUL ACT EVEN IF HE WAS ACTING AS THE CORPORATION'S REPRESENTATIVE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAUREN M.S. BOLFANGO OF BOLFANGO & MCKOWAN, LLP, TEL. NO. 946-4015 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
ATTY. KEITH L. COOPER OF DE LA PENA & HOLIDAY, LLP, TEL. NO. 268-8000 APPEARING FOR THE CROSS-DEFENDANT SCHMITT HEATING CO., INC. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RUSSELL MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff alleges misrepresentations of fact. For example, paragraphs 42-44 of the Amended Complaint allege that defendant falsely represented that the work was compliant with the building code. An individual defendant is liable for his own wrongful act even if he was acting as the corporation's representative. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RUSSELL MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiffs must plead fraud with more specificity, including facts regarding how the misrepresentation was made and where it was made. Plaintiff must also allege facts to show that Murphy should be personally liable for such representations. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
